title: Office Notarial de Baillargues ransomware incident

extortion.description: L’Office Notarial de Baillargues is a notarial office that provides legal advice and services in various fields of law, such as family and inheritance law, urban planning and construction law, rural and agricultural law, etc. It was founded in 1976 and is located in Baillargues, a commune in the Montpellier Métropole in southern France.
